race.description: Searles Garden Products Qtis 2YO Mdn Plate
race.comment: MISHANI SENORITA (7) has been knocking on the door in similar races, including placing only try at this course and distance. Will box seat and looks hard to beat again. PIPPIE POMAR (9) has also run well in similar races including placing 2/3 course and distance. Well in with the claim and can run well fresh. OUTATICK (8) showed some ability in her first three starts, namely the fourth at Eagle Farm two back. Bolted in with a recent trial win and looks primed to run well here fresh. HIDDEN SPHERE (1) is a first starter. Three-year-old gelding making debut by Exosphere out of Hidden Love. Was second in a Doomben trial over 840m and looks primed for a big debut. KID MCKINLAY (6) is also on debut. By Power and is out of the Alyssa & Troy Sweeney stable. Comes here off a Toowoomba Inner Track trial. Top-three chance.
